Title.text: How can we help you today?

Text.text: Choose a service below to find trusted helpers near you.

SearchField.placeholder: Search tasks by title, description, or location…

core:HTML.content: Map View Centered on You

List.noDataText: No tasks found. Try a different search or category.
You haven't posted any tasks yet.
No messages yet. Tap 'Message' on a helper's profile or task to start a conversation.
No bookings yet. Book a helper to get started!
No saved helpers yet. Tap ♡ on a helper card to save them.

core:HTML.content: Map View Centered on You
Advertisement

List.noDataText: No helpers nearby yet. Showing more helpers as they join.

core:HTML.content: Advertisement

Input.valueStateText: Enter a valid postal code (3–10 characters)

Title.text: {= ${appData>/onboarding/step} === 1 ? '👋 Welcome to HelpHub' : ${appData>/onboarding/step} === 2 ? '⚙️ How it works' : '🎯 Pick your interests'}

Text.text: HelpHub connects you with verified local helpers for everyday tasks — gardening, babysitting, IT support and more.
Pick from 12 categories like gardening, cleaning, IT support and more.
See ratings, experience, price, distance and availability at a glance.
Send a booking request, chat with the helper and track your schedule.
Select services you're most interested in.

List.noDataText: No reviews yet — be the first!

Label.text: What do you need help with?

Input.placeholder: e.g. Mow my lawn this Saturday

TextArea.placeholder: Add details — size, tools needed, special instructions…
